query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pipeline_execution_log (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  execution_id VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  pipeline_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  triggered_by VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  started_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  completed_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
  duration_ms INT NULL,
  status VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  
  sources_attempted INT NOT NULL,
  sources_succeeded INT NOT NULL,
  sources_failed INT NOT NULL,
  
  items_fetched INT NOT NULL,
  items_deduplicated INT NOT NULL,
  items_processed INT NOT NULL,
  items_saved INT NOT NULL,
  items_failed INT NOT NULL,
  
  ai_calls_made INT NOT NULL,
  ai_calls_succeeded INT NOT NULL,
  ai_calls_failed INT NOT NULL,
  ai_avg_quality_score FLOAT NULL,
  
  items_with_summary INT NOT NULL,
  items_with_regulation_tags INT NOT NULL,
  items_with_gs1_impact_tags INT NOT NULL,
  items_with_sector_tags INT NOT NULL,
  items_with_recommendations INT NOT NULL,
  
  error_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  error_messages TEXT NULL,
  warnings TEXT NULL,
  
  config_snapshot TEXT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  
  INDEX idx_started_at (started_at DESC),
  INDEX idx_status (status),
  INDEX idx_pipeline_type (pipeline_type),
  INDEX idx_execution_id (execution_id)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 31QbGTVHxF7ThTp.root --database cozU6EotfgGjqPV9552owj --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pipeline_execution_log (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  execution_id VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  pipeline_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  triggered_by VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  started_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  completed_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
  duration_ms INT NULL,
  status VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  
  sources_attempted INT NOT NULL,
  sources_succeeded INT NOT NULL,
  sources_failed INT NOT NULL,
  
  items_fetched INT NOT NULL,
  items_deduplicated INT NOT NULL,
  items_processed INT NOT NULL,
  items_saved INT NOT NULL,
  items_failed INT NOT NULL,
  
  ai_calls_made INT NOT NULL,
  ai_calls_succeeded INT NOT NULL,
  ai_calls_failed INT NOT NULL,
  ai_avg_quality_score FLOAT NULL,
  
  items_with_summary INT NOT NULL,
  items_with_regulation_tags INT NOT NULL,
  items_with_gs1_impact_tags INT NOT NULL,
  items_with_sector_tags INT NOT NULL,
  items_with_recommendations INT NOT NULL,
  
  error_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  error_messages TEXT NULL,
  warnings TEXT NULL,
  
  config_snapshot TEXT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  
  INDEX idx_started_at (started_at DESC),
  INDEX idx_status (status),
  INDEX idx_pipeline_type (pipeline_type),
  INDEX idx_execution_id (execution_id)
);
